title: Zylo Import Job
description: An import job represents an asynchronous task for importing user, license, and activity data into Zylo from a CSV file for a specific subscription.

id.description: The unique identifier of the import job.

subscriptionId.description: The subscription ID this import job is associated with.

status.description: The current status of the import job.

fileName.description: The name of the uploaded CSV file.

recordsProcessed.description: The number of records processed from the CSV file.

recordsFailed.description: The number of records that failed to import.

createdAt.description: The date and time the import job was created.

completedAt.description: The date and time the import job completed.

error.description: Error message if the job failed.
